subject: Bounsweet, a small round fruit-like Pokemon with a pink body and green leafy calyx on its head, standing in green grass
description: A small, spherical creature with a smooth pink body and a leafy green calyx sprouting from its top stands on green grass. The setting is a bright, sunlit outdoor meadow or garden. The creature looks small, round, and cheerful. The palette is vibrant pink and green against a lush green grassy background with a warm, soft sky.
foreground: small pink round creature with leafy green top on grass
